entity.label: Sansannah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A palm branch, or a thorn bush, a town in the south (the negeb) of Judah (Josh. 15:31); called also Hazarsusah (19:5), or Hazar-susim (1 Chr. 4:31).

nodes.label: Sansannah
nodes.description: A palm branch, or a thorn bush, a town in the south (the negeb) of Judah (Josh. 15:31); called also Hazarsusah (19:5), or Hazar-susim (1 Chr. 4:31).

verses.text: And Ziklag, and Madmannah, and Sansannah,
